name: batches_dry_run
description: Simulate sending a batch without actually delivering messages. Returns the number of recipients and estimated message parts for cost estimation.

parameters.name: service_plan_id
parameters.description: Your Sinch service plan ID (path parameter).

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The message body text to simulate.

parameters.name: per_recipient
parameters.description: If true, returns per-recipient message breakdown.

body.body: Hello, this is a test message for cost estimation.
